title: Krytox gpl 105
description: Krytox GPL 105 - 10 grams net weight in handy dropper bottle. High performance PPPE anti-squeak oil for the automotive industry. Krytox GPL oils are based on perfluoropolyethers (PFPE) and provide superior stability, lubricity, viscosity and value. Krytox GPL 105 is a high performance, fully fluorinated oil that provides superior lubrication in a wide temperature range and unmatched chemical resistance. The inert nature of Krytox ensures it lasts longer than other chemical substances such as silicone and carbon-based lubricants. This unique base oil is 100% non-flammable and does not support combustion, even in environments with 100% liquid or gaseous oxygen. The applied lubricant does not migrate and is ideal for automotive applications, especially for eliminating NVH (noise, vibration and hardness). The industry standard recommended Krytox grade for squeak and rattle protection is GPL 105 as recommended by VW Group including Audi, Skoda and Seat, Plus, Land Rover etc. Important considerations before use: the surface for application must be clean before application. by Krytox. GPL 105 - Free from body wax, silicone etc. methylated spirits as a solvent can be used before application to achieve this. - The application amounts should be minimal, resist the temptation to apply excessively. Be aware of impurities in unwanted areas such as glass and paint as they are very difficult to remove.

title: Kinderkraft I-SPARK I-SIZE Baby Car Seat, Group 2/3, 100-150 cm, From 3.5 To 12 Years, 15 to 36 Kg, Light (4.5 Kg), 3-point Seat Belt, Side Protection, Black
description:
I-SPARK i-Size is a 2-in-1 child seat for children with a height of 100-150 cm (from approx. 3.5 to 12 years / 15-36 kg), which is compliant with the latest i-Size safety standard R129. With the 3-point car belt, the installation of the child seat is quick and easy. It is a lightweight child seat (4.5 kg) that can be easily carried from one car to another. You can easily adjust the I-SPARK i-Size backrest to the car seat - the child seat will fit snugly to the car seat, which increases driving safety. 

I-SPARK i-Size effectively protects your child while driving. It has been tested very precisely under very strict conditions, including frontal and side collisions with a speed increase of up to 28%. Tests carried out at higher speeds allow a more accurate test of the breaking strength of the shell (including cracking) as it acts on it by 50% higher kinetic energy. 

The child seat has a reinforced, 3-layer headrest with the H-Guard system. Additional layers located in the headrest distribute the force acting on the child. They dissipate the energy generated in the event of an impact and thus protect the child's head and neck. The headrest can be adjusted with one hand and comfortably adjusted in 10 levels. The I-SPARK i-Size child seat is also equipped with the SPS, a reinforced side protection that absorbs the energy generated in a collision. It effectively protects the shoulders and spine of the child. 

The seat of the child seat is covered with soft material. You can remove and wash the cover at any time. In addition, the seat has comfortable armrests and the seat itself is large, so that even a larger child can sit in it without any problems. 

* The seat can be used without backrest as a booster seat for older children with a height of 140-150 cm. If your child already feels uncomfortable in the child seat, but the car belt does not yet run over the shoulder and chest centre, simply remove the backrest and use only the seat. It has been tested and ensures safety for the child. 

Craftsmanship: 
Material: Shell: Polypropylene (HDPE); Cover: Polyester

title: Guardian Bell Biker Bell, Motorcycle Bell Lucky Charm, Stainless Steel Motorcycle Bell, Protective Bell Angel Riding Bell, Motorcycle Bell Keyring for Blessing the Peace
description:
The Guardian Bell, also known as the Gremlin Bell or Spirit Bell, is a distinctive element in the world of motorcycle sports. These little bells attached to the bottom of the frame of many motorcycles are much more than just an ornament. 

The Guardian Bell has its roots in a legend about evil spirits, so-called goblins, lurking on the streets. Legend has it that these goblins are always looking for motorcyclists to cling to and cause unusual problems, especially in the field of the engine or electrical systems. The guardian bell is designed to protect bikers from these ghosts on their rides. 

Legend has it that the bell works by capturing the ghosts in its sound cave. The constant ringing of the bell makes them angry until they get exhausted from their clutch and return to the road. In this way, the bell protects the rider from the trouble caused by the gremlins. 

However, in order for the Gremlin bell to develop its effect, some "rules" must be observed. First of all, the bell must not be purchased by the biker who uses it. For it to work, it must be given to the biker by a loved one. It also needs to be attached to the bottom of the frame so that it is the first thing the goblins find when trying to hold onto the motorcycle. 

Another important aspect of the Guardian Bell is its symbolic meaning. The bell is not only a form of protection from evil spirits on the road, but also a symbol of friendship and brotherhood among bikers. When a bell is donated, it is a gesture of kindness and a desire for safety in road traffic. It's a way of saying to the recipient, "I care about you and hope you're always safe on the road". 

In summary, the Guardian Bell is more than just a jewel for a motorcycle. It is a strong symbol of protection, friendship and brotherhood in the motorcycle world. Whether you believe in the legend of the goblins of the road or not, with a Guardian Bell on your motorcycle you can carry a piece of this rich culture with you every time you swing on the saddle.
about_product: QUALITY AND EXQUISIBILITY Our Guardian Bell decorated with 3D reliefs is exquisite. The motorcycle bell retains its shape and colour even after many rides in different weather conditions and can withstand the rigors of open road and long rides.

A must for happiness: hanging Guardian bell on the motorcycle can repel ghosts, bring luck to the rider and help him solve mechanical problems and bad luck while riding! If you give them as a gift, the magic is doubled and the recipient is twice as lucky.
Crisp Ringtone The crisp, loud ringtone accompanies the motorcyclist throughout the ride, reminding him to ride carefully and tell the rider at any time: I need it by my side.
PERFECT GIFT Give our biker guardian angel bell to all lovers of freedom on two wheels, show your friends and family that you are thinking of them by giving them this symbol of safety and style.

Package contents: you will receive a motorcycle bell lucky charm, a delicate velvet bag, our bell fits not only on motorcycles and bicycles, but also on car key fobs, bringing a touch of happiness and personality to your vehicle.
After-sale Service Since the product is purely hand packed, please contact us when you receive a package with missing or damaged products, and we will solve the problem in time for you.

title: ABUS PS22 Care Spray - Grease-free Lubricant for Door Cylinders, Car Locks, Tools - Against Wear and Squeeze - 13 ml Blue
description:
Product Description               ABUS PS22 care spray – the care for your cylinders. 

The right care does: with our PS22 care spray, your lock cylinder closes smoothly and easily for many years. The care spray is suitable for all lock cylinders: whether door cylinder, bicycle lock cylinder or padlock cylinder. It ensures that your cylinders inside remain well maintained and therefore functional. 

Is your key jamming or hooking? With the PS22, it can always be turned around. The care spray also helps against squeaky garage doors, door hinges or windows. In addition, it is a practical everyday helper if your bicycle chain does not run round on the go. With regular use, the lubricant can even prevent rust and corrosion. Another highlight: the spray does not contain propellant gas - making the PS22 more environmentally friendly compared to other care sprays. 

Other product advantages: 

Sustainable care – no propellant gas in the can. 
Corrosion protection with regular use. 
Maintains delicate mechanics inside the lock. 
Displaces moisture from locks                  Brand Description               ABUS - innovative Sicherheitslösungen seit 1924
Die Geschichte von ABUS ist die Geschichte eines Unternehmens, das sich von Beginn an einer einzigen Mission verschrieben hat: Das Leben der Menschen sicherer zu machen – zuhause und unterwegs. Was einst mit der Produktion von Vorhangschlössern in der hauseigenen Schmiede begann, ist zu einem global agierenden Unternehmen mit führender Expertise im Bereich der Sicherheit geworden. Kundenzentriert, innovativ und zuverlässig, setzen wir Sicherheitsbedürfnisse um und begeistern Menschen seit Generationen für unsere Produkte.​

Preparation: 1. Unscrew the thinner end of the plug. 2. Unscrew the middle part of the plug. 3. Remove the plug part from the housing. 4. Now there are 6 individual parts in the following order (from left to right): end part with logo, component with contact pins, screw connection, sealing ring, strain relief, end nut

Use: 1. Pull through harness in this order: nut, strain relief, gasket and screw connection. 2. Insert component into the template with contact pins so that you can see the screws and the stencil print. 3. Insert all cables into the respective screw terminals of the connector according to the template labelling and screw them tightly. 4. Remove the template and insert component into the end part (nose on nose). Assemble all parts in reverse order.
